name: /pr-corpus-learn codebase-impact preview reports the count of files the new rule would flag
command:
mkdir -p tree pr-corpus && for f in a b c; do printf 'eval(x)
' > tree/$f.js; done && printf '[{"id":"no-eval","detector":"grep -lE eval","verbatim_quote":"avoid eval","usefulness_estimate":5,"supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"org":"a","tier":1},{"number":2,"org":"b","tier":1},{"number":3,"org":"c","tier":1}]}]
' > pr-corpus/patterns.json && printf '{"gate":"pass"}
' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-learn.sh" --patterns pr-corpus/patterns.json --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --root tree --preview-only 2>out.txt && grep -q 'files_flagged=3' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
